output: sources/bank1/checking/cleaned/2023/jan.csv
command: ./preprocess
args: raw/2023/jan.csv
deps: sources/bank1/checking/raw/2023/jan.csv

output: sources/bank1/checking/cleaned/2024/jan.csv
command: ./preprocess
args: raw/2024/jan.csv
deps: sources/bank1/checking/raw/2024/jan.csv

output: sources/bank1/checking/journal/2023/jan.journal
command: ./convert
args: cleaned/2023/jan.csv
deps: sources/bank1/checking/cleaned/2023/jan.csv

output: sources/bank1/checking/journal/2024/jan.journal
command: ./convert
args: cleaned/2024/jan.csv
deps: sources/bank1/checking/cleaned/2024/jan.csv

output: sources/bank2/savings/journal/2023/jan.journal
command: ./convert
args: raw/2023/jan.csv
deps: sources/bank2/savings/raw/2023/jan.csv

output: sources/bank2/savings/journal/2024/jan.journal
command: ./convert
args: raw/2024/jan.csv
deps: sources/bank2/savings/raw/2024/jan.csv
